html:
“Creates a light when held.
Can light targets on fire.”

-

The Torch is a portable Light Item. It can be crafted with 2 Cut Grass and 2 Twigs, and is available from the start of the game.

Torches burn while equipped, providing a source of light for the player. A Torch will last for 75 seconds. In Rain, a Torch may burn up to 150% faster depending on precipitation rate but will not be affected if the player is sheltered under the Trees. Torch also provides 20% Wetness resistance when equipped. If the player has an extra Torch, it will be automatically equipped in place of the spent Torch.

Enemies that get hit by a Torch have a chance to be ignited.

Dragging a Torch over objects such as Trees, Spider Dens, or Beehives and right clicking, or equipping a Torch and right clicking on such objects, will light them on fire. If the burning object contains creatures like a Beehive does, they will exit the structure when it is set ablaze. Burning objects will ignite other nearby objects (or creatures), possibly spreading to cause massive fires. Items that were burnt turned into Ashes. It can also burn down Carcasses.

Torches can be used as a way to dissipate Miasma. It can also causes Crystal Deerclops to be stunned for a short period of time while it lacks both of the crystals on its back, which also gets rid of the aura of ice around it for the duration of the stun.

Contents

  • 1 Skill Tree (Wilson)
    • 1.1 Torch Longevity
    • 1.2 Torch Range
    • 1.3 Torch Toss
  • 2 Skill Tree (Willow)
    • 2.1 Controlled Burning
  • 3 Skins
  • 4 Tips
  • 5 Trivia
  • 6 Assets
  • 7 Gallery

Skill Tree (Wilson)

Torch Longevity

Wilson with Torch Longevity I-II-III skills, respectively, increases the durability of Torches by 19-47-100% (total of 90-110-150 seconds).

Torch Range

Wilson with Torch Range I-II-III skills, respectively, Increases the light radius of Torches to 1.5 to 2 to 2.5 tiles.

Torch Toss

Wilson with Torch Toss skill can throw a torch on the ground, where it will continue to burn and emit light until picked up.

Skill Tree (Willow)

Controlled Burning

Items like Torches and Willow's Lighter have a 100% chance to ignite enemies.

Skins

Main article: Belongings

  • The Heirloom Elegant Hallowed Light skin was only obtainable during official Hallowed Nights events until 2020.
  • The Timeless Carrat Torch skin was originally awarded for playing Don't Starve Together during the official Year of the Carrat event in 2020. As of February 11, 2021, the Loyal version of this skin was available in the Klei Rewards shop for 1,200 Klei points.
  • The Timeless Carved Stone Torch skin was awarded for pre-ordering Don't Starve Together on Wegame, and the Loyal version of this skin was available in the Klei Rewards shop for 1,200 Klei points.
  • The Loyal Conch Torch skin was awarded for watching 6 hours of Don't Starve Together on Twitch starting from January 27, 2022 to February 10, 2022.
  • The Timeless Tragic Torch skin was awarded for solving the Cyclum Puzzles and could only be obtained before May 16, 2016, while the Loyal variant was awarded after this date. This skin is required to start the Metheus Puzzles.
  • The Proof of Purchase Electro-Neutronic Torch skin is obtained by purchasing the Wilson Bandai Firelink Don't Starve.
Woven - Elegant / Heirloom Elegant
Costume Collection
Hallowed Light
Repel the dark these Hallowed Nights with a dreadful beacon of most Hallowed Light.

Tragic Torch
At first glance this torch appears menacing, but holding it makes you feel quite sad.
See ingame
Elegant
Barber's Collection
Oil Torch
Keep burning the midnight oil.
Proof of Purchase
Electro-Neutronic Torch
Don't mind that odd buzzing sound, this new invention is perfectly safe! ...Probably.
Woven - Distinguished
Cawnival Collection
Cawnival Torch
There's nothing like a day at the Cawnival to brighten the mood.

Tips

  • If the player does not have enough Torches to keep Charlie away for a whole night, they can light a tree or other burnable object on fire and then unequip the Torch until the object has burnt out, extending the lifetime of the Torch's fire.
  • Another option is to "flash" the Torch (equip the Torch and unequip it immediately) every several seconds right before Charlie attacks to keep her at bay. However, Sanity drains faster in complete darkness.
  • When the player wakes up, the Torch will not lose durability until it is re-equipped.

Trivia

  • The game files have contained code for a Torch's capability to give off warmth ever since Winter was implemented, however this code has never actually been used.

Skill Tree (Wilson)[edit | edit source]
Torch Longevity[edit | edit source]
Wilson with Torch Longevity I-II-III skills, respectively, increases the durability of Torches by 19-47-100% (total of 90-110-150 seconds).
Torch Range[edit | edit source]
Wilson with Torch Range I-II-III skills, respectively, Increases the light radius of Torches to 1.5 to 2 to 2.5 tiles.
Torch Toss[edit | edit source]
Wilson with Torch Toss skill can throw a torch on the ground, where it will continue to burn and emit light until picked up.
Skill Tree (Willow)[edit | edit source]
Controlled Burning[edit | edit source]
Items like Torches and Willow's Lighter have a 100% chance to ignite enemies.
Skins[edit | edit source]
Main article: Belongings
The Heirloom Elegant Hallowed Light skin was only obtainable during official Hallowed Nights events until 2020.
The Timeless Carrat Torch skin was originally awarded for playing Don't Starve Together during the official Year of the Carrat event in 2020. As of February 11, 2021, the Loyal version of this skin was available in the Klei Rewards shop for 1,200 Klei points.
The Timeless Carved Stone Torch skin was awarded for pre-ordering Don't Starve Together on Wegame, and the Loyal version of this skin was available in the Klei Rewards shop for 1,200 Klei points.
The Loyal Conch Torch skin was awarded for watching 6 hours of Don't Starve Together on Twitch starting from January 27, 2022 to February 10, 2022.
The Timeless Tragic Torch skin was awarded for solving the Cyclum Puzzles and could only be obtained before May 16, 2016, while the Loyal variant was awarded after this date. This skin is required to start the Metheus Puzzles.
The Proof of Purchase Electro-Neutronic Torch skin is obtained by purchasing the Wilson Bandai Firelink Don't Starve.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Đuốc là một Vật phẩm Ánh sáng di động. Nó có thể được chế tạo bằng 2 Cỏ Cắt và 2 Cành Cây, và có sẵn ngay từ đầu trò chơi.

It can be crafted with 2 [[Cut Grass]] and 2 [[Twigs]], and is available from the start of the game. Torches [[Fire#Fuel Values|burn]] while equipped, providing a source of light for the player. A Torch will last for 75 seconds. In [[Rain]], a Torch may burn up to 150% faster depending on ''precipitation rate'' but will not be affected if the player is sheltered under the [[Trees]]. Torch also provides 20% [[Wetness]] resistance when equipped. If the player has an extra Torch, it will be automatically equipped in place of the spent Torch. Enemies that get hit by a Torch have a chance to be ignited. Dragging a Torch over objects such as [[Tree]]s, [[Spider Den]]s, or [[Beehive]]s and right clicking, or equipping a Torch and right clicking on such objects, will light them on fire. If the burning object contains creatures like a Beehive does, they will exit the structure when it is set ablaze. Burning objects will ignite other nearby objects (or creatures), possibly spreading to cause massive fires. Items that were burnt turned into [[Ashes/DST|Ashes]]. It can also burn down [[Carcass/DST|Carcasses]]. Torches can be used as a way to dissipate [[Miasma]]. It can also causes [[Crystal Deerclops]] to be stunned for a short period of time while it lacks both of the crystals on its back, which also gets rid of the aura of ice around it for the duration of the stun. == {{Pic32|Insight}} Skill Tree (Wilson) == ==={{picDark|32|Torch Longevity 1}} Torch Longevity=== Wilson with [[Wilson/Don't Starve Together#Torch Longevity|Torch Longevity I-II-III]] skills, respectively, increases the durability of Torches by 19-47-100% (total of 90-110-150 seconds). ==={{picDark|32|Torch Range 1}} Torch Range=== Wilson with [[Wilson/Don't Starve Together#Torch Range|Torch Range I-II-III]] skills, respectively, Increases the light radius of Torches to 1.5 to 2 to 2.5 tiles. ==={{picDark|32|Torch Toss}} Torch Toss=== Wilson with [[Wilson/Don't Starve Together#Torch Toss|Torch Toss]] skill can throw a torch on the ground, where it will continue to burn and emit light until picked up. == {{Pic32|Insight}} Skill Tree (Willow) == === {{picDark|32|Controlled Burning}} Controlled Burning === Items like Torches and Willow's Lighter have a 100% chance to ignite enemies. == [[File:Skins Icon.png|32px|link=]] Skins == {{Main|Belongings#Tools Skins|Belongings}} * The '''Heirloom Elegant Hallowed Light''' skin was only obtainable during official [[Hallowed Nights]] events until 2020. * The '''Timeless Carrat Torch''' skin was originally awarded for playing ''Don't Starve Together'' during the official [[Year of the Carrat]] event in 2020.
